summary: Tested Event Routing Fix: (1) Event summary loads with auth headers, (2) Route single note creates actions with correct program_id, (3) Routed actions appear in School Pod. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The fix correctly looks up program_id from athlete+school name and creates school-scoped actions.
critical_code_review_comments: _find_program_id helper correctly looks up program_id via athlete_id → user → tenant_id → programs (events.py lines 26-49)
route_single_note now includes program_id in response (line 277)
Actions and timeline notes created with program_id set (lines 249-275, 300-328)
EventSummary.js correctly adds authHeaders() to all axios calls (lines 29, 42, 53)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ROUTING_ notes for Emma Chen × Stanford during testing. Routed actions created with correct program_id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event routing fix verified. _find_program_id helper looks up program_id from athlete+school. Route to Pod buttons change to 'Routed' after clicking. Toast notification shows 'Routed to Support Pod — synced'. School Pod shows event-sourced actions with correct program_id. Playbook persistence regression tests also passed.

frontend_ui: Coach login via demo account - PASS
Navigate to Event Summary page (event_0) - PASS
Event name shows 'Winter Showcase — Summary' - PASS
Event stats (11 notes, 4 schools, 6 athletes, 11 follow-ups) - PASS
Generate AI Recap button present - PASS
Generate Follow-Up Suggestions button present - PASS
Hottest Interest section with interest badges - PASS
Route to Pod button click → changes to Routed - PASS
Toast notification 'Routed to Support Pod — synced' - PASS
